reason: Check backend work against ScopyKit conventions and required quality gates.
Review backend file placement, target boundaries, and ScopyKit layering.
Review persistence, search index, settings, and cleanup changes for consistency.
Review thrown errors, cancellation, and startup/recovery behavior.
Review ScopyLog category use and privacy-safe logging.
Review backend gates, actor/concurrency boundaries, and forbidden patterns.
Check native macOS UI work against Scopy frontend conventions.
Review native UI file placement, target boundaries, and ScopyUISupport usage.
Review SwiftUI/AppKit component, settings, history row, and accessibility behavior.
Review lifecycle callbacks, task cancellation, and AppKit/WebKit bridge ownership.
Review Observation, main-actor state, service boundaries, and settings transaction semantics.
Review UI tests, accessibility identifiers, performance gates, hotkey, and settings verification.
Check for cross-layer and reuse issues when changes span UI/backend.
